description: Stores user-submitted intake requests, including the original note and later AI enrichment outputs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the intake request.

submitterName.description: Name of the person who submitted the request.

submitterEmail.description: Email address of the person who submitted the request.

note.description: The user-submitted note describing the request.

aiSummary.description: AI-generated summary of the note. Written by the system, never by the submitter.
